name: Black Cleaver

passives.name: Carve
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|physical damage}} to an enemy champion applies a stack of ''Carve'' for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Each stack inflicts {{as|6% armor reduction}}, up to {{as|30%|armor}} at 5 stacks.

passives.name: Fervor
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|physical damage}} grants you {{as|20 '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 2 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Physical damage applies armor reduction stacks (6% per stack) up to 30% for 6s.
Physical damage grants 20 bonus movement speed for 2s.

simpleDescription: Dealing physical damage to enemy champions reduces their Armor

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Carve applies on physical damage instances to enemy champions, stacking armor reduction up to five stacks with independent refresh windows.

Player-visible behavior: Carve armor reduction applies after the triggering damage instance resolves, so the hit that applies a stack does not benefit from that new stack; Fervor grants short movement-speed bursts on physical-damage events.
